title: CBB Rulebook Volume 6 Crypto-Asset Module CRA-5 Technology Governance and Cyber Security
summary: Requires crypto-asset licensees to maintain robust cybersecurity risk management frameworks, security strategy and policy, cyber incident detection, cyber resilience, cryptographic key controls, wallet controls, cyber training and two-hour incident reporting.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Technology governance and cybersecurity rules for crypto-asset licensees.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: Cyber incident reporting rules for crypto-asset service providers.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix A Cyber Security Control Guidelines and CBB Crypto-Asset Module
